title: Grupo Erik Ceramic Mug - Minions Gifts | 11.8 oz - 350 ml Coffee Mug Tea, Cool Mugs and Cups | Gifts Under 10 Pounds, Funny Gifts for Friends
features: Cute Mug - Large tea cup with bright colours inspired in Dave who is an intelligent minion who is kind, caring, and funny, but sometimes accident-prone.
Coffee Cups Ceramic - Ceramic coffee cup has a capacity of 350 ml (35 cl) and is made of ceramic. This large mug measures 9.5 cm in height and 8 cm in diameter and is shipped in a protective box.
Dishwasher & Microwave Safe - Tea cups made with top quality ceramic for greater conservation and resistance are dishwasher safe and you can use them in microwave.
Ideal New Home Gifts - Coffee mugs are great as a Christmas gifts or birthday gifts for family and friends, friend gifts and many other special occasions.

Creating Your Story - Grupo Erik creates 100% official licensed stationery and merchandise inspired by the world’s most loved brands. Combining functionality and durability, our products are designed to be part of your daily life.
description: Discover Our Exclusive Collection of Grupo Erik Official Licensed Mugs! Start your mornings with a touch of fun, style, and nostalgia thanks to our fantastic range of mugs. From iconic TV series like Friends , Harry Potter , and Stranger Things to beloved anime titles such as Attack on Titan , Jujutsu Kaisen , and One Piece , there's a perfect mug waiting just for you. Crafted with high-quality ceramic, each mug boasts vibrant, durable prints featuring your favourite characters, themes, and designs, including classics like Frida Kahlo , The Beatles , and Snoopy . Whether you're a fan of magical adventures, gripping dramas, or adorable illustrations from Pusheen , you'll find your ideal companion for tea or coffee time. Our selection includes standard, 3D, premium, and heat-sensitive colour-changing mugs, designed to enhance your drinking experience. From the intricate designs of Willy Wonka 's golden tickets and bars to dynamic gaming motifs from Street Fighter and Gameration , our mugs make exceptional gifts and collectible items. Enjoy the convenience of dishwasher and microwave safety with most mugs, ensuring practicality meets personality in your daily routine. Choose your favourite or collect them all to celebrate your passions every day. Elevate your kitchen cupboard with mugs that speak to you—expressive, durable, and always ready to bring a smile to your face.
